titleStmt.title: SII 4.1086: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1086. (A.R. No. 238 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīvelanāṇṭigoṁkkanṛpatēssūnussatāmagraṇī rājēṁdrēṇa kṛtādaraḥ kṣitimimāṁ
cōḍa kāmuka payōdhiraśanānni¨rjitya yō vairiṇaḥ matiśrī ma
vāstavyaḥ svavṛtōbhidhānaviditagrā yayāsīddhanī . śrīmanmaṁcena
vimaladhīstasyātmajassadguṇaḥ sōyaṁ maṁtriśikhāmaṇi¨rbudhanidhi
marabhūruhaḥ pṛthuyaśāssatyēna dha¨rmmātmajaḥ raṁ mṛgapatiṁ śau¨ryyēṇa
dēvēṁdrāśabhavaṁ gaṁbhīratastōyadhiṁ . śākābdēśaranāgakhēṁddugaṇitēcaitrē catu¨rttaṁ tikā kṛṣṇē caṁdradinē yutē viṣuvatā ka¨rppūrava¨rtyānvitaṁ dī
bhīmēśvarāyādarā dācaṁdrā¨rkkamakhaṇḍadīpamadiśatsōyaṁ dvijanmāgraṇīḥ . dattaṁ cānēna tasmai tribhuvanapatayē cūtapunnāgaraṁbhājaṁbīra
ḥ kalpitārāmabhūmēḥ dīpasyāsya prakalpya prakaṭavaradaśāyuktaka¨rppūravrityaiḥ kṛtvā caṇḍēśamūlyāddaśadiśi purasyāsya bhīmēśvarasya
1085 gu nēṇṭi śrīrājarājasaṁvatsa 18 śrāhi viṣuvusaṁkraṁtti nimittamuna śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvara kulōttuṁggavelanāṇṭirājēṁdracōḍayarāju
la pradhāni Amṛtulūri maṁccirāju koḍku dēvanapeggaḍa śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvarakuṁ beṭṭina Akhaṇḍaka¨rppurava¨rttilōhadaṇḍu diviya 1 ṇṭiki bōlu na
luvuruṁ būṇṭagā reṇḍavunaḍapuna paṇḍanūṁkani vasamunaṁ beṭṭina InupaEḍlu 50 ṇṭiki Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu nityapaḍi golavaṁgala tribhuvanāṁkku
śa nēmāna 1 likitaṁ peddanācā¨ryyē(ḥ)ṇa .
Digital edition of SII 4.1086 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
